emails.subject: Statoil Consent to Assignment
emails.body: Statoil Consent to Assignment CRM consents to the assignment; however, if you feel that we can use the consent to move the J Aron ISDA negotiations forward, it is worth a try. I wouldn't want to hold the assignment up for too long, but if we can convince J Aron that putting this additional number of trades under the old document is a bad idea; hopefully, we can finalize the document. My understanding is that the Enron gty is the only outstanding issue, is that correct? Thanks, Tanya

emails.subject: Statoil Consent to Assignment

emails.subject: Re: Statoil Consent to Assignment
emails.body: Re: Statoil Consent to Assignment I have forwarded the Statoil/J.Aron trades down to Bob Klein and Jeff Sorenson to sign off on the actual deals listed. I'll keep you posted...
